zh.Dendermonde, Flandre Orientale, Belgium: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫登德爾蒙德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy於1130年出生在比利時時，他的父親Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy41歲，母親Elisabeth de Namur36歲。他於1171年與Clementine van Roucy結婚。他去世於1187年7月4日在巴勒斯坦享年57歲。

zh-hans.Dendermonde, Flandre Orientale, Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫登德爾蒙德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy于1130年出生在比利时时，他的父亲Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy41岁，母亲Elisabeth de Namur36岁。他于1171年与Clementine van Roucy结婚。他去世于1187年7月4日在巴勒斯坦享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Rosoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Miguel, Asencio, Edgardo, Estela, Francisco, Jaime, Jorge, Mercedes.
Spanish: probably of Italian origin, an altered form of   Rossi  .

variants.name: Rossi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Aldo, Gino, Luigi, Carlo, Carmine, Domenic, Pasquale, Salvatore, Dino.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Rosso  . This is the commonest surname in Italy. It is also found in Spain (mainly Cádiz). Compare   De Rossi  ,   Rossey  ,   Rossie  , and   Rossy  .
American shortened form (and Greek feminine form, denoting ‘the daughter, or wife of’) of Greek Rossis: of Italian origin (see 1 above), although usually assumed to be related to Rhōssos ‘Russian’.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy was born in 1130, in Belgium, his father, Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy, was 41 and his mother, Elisabeth de Namur, was 36. He married Clementine van Roucy in 1171. He died on 4 July 1187, in Palestine, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy est né en 1130, à Belgique, son père, Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Namur, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Clementine van Roucy en 1171. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1187, à Palestine, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy 1130 in Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy 41 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Namur 36. Er hat 1171 Clementine van Roucy geheiratet. Er starb am 4. Juli 1187 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy è nato il nel 1130 nel Belgio, il suo padre, Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Namur, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Clementine van Roucy nel 1171. Morì il 4 luglio 1187, nel Palestina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Dendermonde, Flandre Orientale, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンデンデルモンド
ja.lifeSummary: Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoyが1130年にベルギーで生まれた時，父Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoyは41歳，母Elisabeth de Namurは36歳であった。1171年にClementine van Roucyと結婚した。彼は1187年7月4日にパレスチナで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy(이)가 1130년 벨기에에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Namur(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1171년 Clementine van Roucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1187년 7월 4일 팔레스타인에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy nasceu em 1130, em Bélgica, seu pai, Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Namur, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Clementine van Roucy em 1171. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1187, em Palestina, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy родился в 1130 г. в местности Бельгия, его отцу по имени Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Namur, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Clementine van Roucy в 1171 г. Он умер 4 июля 1187 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 57 лет.

sm.between 1169 and 1220: mai le 1169 e o'o I le 1220

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy nació en 1130, en Bélgica, su papá, Seigneur Clarembaudai De Rosoy, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Namur, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Clementine van Roucy en 1171. Murió el 4 de julio de 1187, en Palestina, a la edad de 57 años.
